notes: This run keeps the short-distance four-alternative design but matches the paper's human estimation sample size of 1,445 respondents and six choice tasks per respondent.
The six short-distance choice cards are delivered in one single survey-session prompt per respondent to better mimic one completed questionnaire session and to keep the local Ollama runtime feasible.
The original paper uses 5,000 Sobol draws for simulated mixed logit estimation; this run mirrors that draw method in Python.

MaaS subscription is retained as a persona field for alignment with the original utility specification, but its sample distribution is assumed because the main paper excerpt used here does not report it explicitly.
